# services.navidrome

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.navidrome`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.navidrome.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Navidrome music server. |
| `services.navidrome.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Environment file, used to set any secret ND\_\* environment variables. |
| `services.navidrome.finalPackage` | `package` | The final navidrome package including all selected plugins. |
| `services.navidrome.group` | `string` | Group under which Navidrome runs. |
| `services.navidrome.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the TCP port in the firewall |
| `services.navidrome.package` | `package` | The navidrome package to use. |
| `services.navidrome.plugins` | `list of package that is a navidrome plugin` | List of Navidrome plugins |
| `services.navidrome.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration for Navidrome, see <https://www.navidrome.org/docs/usage/configuration-options/> for supported values. |
| `services.navidrome.settings.Address` | `string` | Address to run Navidrome on. |
| `services.navidrome.settings.EnableInsightsCollector` | `boolean` | Enable anonymous usage data collection, see <https://www.navidrome.org/docs/getting-started/insights/> for details. |
| `services.navidrome.settings.Plugins.Enabled` | `unspecified value` | Enable plugin support in navidrome. |
| `services.navidrome.settings.Plugins.Folder` | `string` | The folder containing navidrome plugins. This directory is automatically created from plugins defined in {option}`services.navidrome.plugins`. |
| `services.navidrome.settings.Port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to run Navidrome on. |
| `services.navidrome.user` | `string` | User under which Navidrome runs. |
